_meta._note: No Google Maps iframe and no contact email present on live contact page. Live contact form has 8 fields (Parent Name, Email, Phone, Child Name, Child's DOB, Diagnosis Yes/No, If yes where, What are your concerns?); per spec we keep 4 visible fields + one optional 'Tell us more' textarea that absorbs the live site's intake extras.

address.heading: Our centre
address._note: No embedded Google Maps iframe on live site.

form.heading: Send us a message
form.subheading: Or chat with us live — bottom right.

fields.concernPlaceholder: Tell us a little about your child
fields.tellUsMorePlaceholder: Your child's age, any diagnosis, what's prompting your enquiry — whatever helps us prepare.

form.successNote: Your default mail app will open with this message ready to send.

errors.emailRequired: We need an email to reply to.
errors.concernRequired: Please tell us what we can help with.

form._note: Live form additionally asks for Child Name, Child's DOB, diagnosis Yes/No, 'If yes, where?'. Our prototype keeps 4 visible fields + one optional 'Tell us more' textarea that captures those intake extras when families want to share them.

chatbotCta.heading: Prefer to chat?
chatbotCta.body: Our assistant can give you a price indication in a minute or two.
